intro.title: Sub-Sol
intro.text:
The room smells of sweat, leather and tired neon.

Your coach, Malik, put a file on the stool.

**"Tonight is your entry in the standings. If you win, contracts come in. If you lose, it's not over. But the road will be longer. *

You put your tapes on.

First opponent: **Viktor Mendez**.

analyse_mendez.title: Analysis — Viktor Mendez
analyse_mendez.narrator: The victory starts before the first shot.
analyse_mendez.text:
Style:
- constant pressure
- jab then left hook
- likes to catch up with the ropes

Weaknesses:
- Opens the liver after its hook
- tired if we make him miss
- hates body to body

Malik hits the file.

**"Retain this: jab, crochet, opening to the body. *

vestiaire_mendez.title: First Combat
vestiaire_mendez.narrator: The noise of the public always seems louder before entering.
vestiaire_mendez.text:
Your name resonates.

Malik tightens your gloves.

*"Read his shoulders. Don't answer random. *

The ring light swallows you.

mendez_1.title: Round 1 — Jab Crochet
mendez_1.text:
Mendez is moving forward.

Jab fast.

His left shoulder goes down.

The hook is coming.

mendez_good_1.title: Touched liver
mendez_good_1.text:
You slide to the right.

His hook's on.

Your glove comes under his ribs.

Mendez grimace.

mendez_block_1.title: High Guard
mendez_block_1.narrator: You survive, but he's gaining ground.
mendez_block_1.text:
The hook type your gloves.

Mendez pushes.

The ropes are behind you.

mendez_bad_1.title: Net touch
mendez_bad_1.text:
The hook is on your head.

The ring is rocking.

Malik shouts:

*"Read it! *

mendez_2.title: Round 1 — Body to Body
mendez_2.text:
Mendez sticks his forehead to yours.

He wants to push you.

mendez_good_2.title: You break his rhythm
mendez_good_2.narrator: The audience doesn't always like smart boxing.
mendez_good_2.text:
You hang it.

You make him wear your weight.

Hands breath.

The referee separates.

mendez_neutral_2.title: Exchange Court
mendez_neutral_2.text:
Your uppercut touches.

Mendez answers the body.

The bell rings.

mendez_bad_2.title: Too wide
mendez_bad_2.text:
Your hook is too wide.

Mendez goes under.

Two shots to the body.

The bell saves you.

coin_mendez.title: The Corner — Malik
coin_mendez.narrator: Between two rounds, the fight continues in the head.
coin_mendez.text:
Malik pours water on your neck.

**"He always opens after crochet. But be careful: He knows now that you've seen him. He's gonna make a joke. *

mendez_3.title: Round 2 — The Feint
mendez_3.narrator: He knows you saw his hook.
mendez_3.text:
Mendez is moving forward.

Jab.

Lower left shoulder.

But his gaze goes down to your belly.

Feint?

mendez_good_3.title: You read The Trap
mendez_good_3.text:
You keep your position.

His body hook is hitting your elbow.

He's too close.

Opening.

mendez_neutral_3.title: Jab d'Arrét
mendez_neutral_3.text:
Your jab cuts his entrance.

Mendez slows down.

You win the round without shining.

mendez_bad_3.title: You bite
mendez_bad_3.text:
You go right.

Hang on.

His direct cut you off.

You're laying a knee.

mendez_ko.title: Mendez Tombe
mendez_ko.narrator: The first big sound of your career.
mendez_ko.text:
Your short hook touches.

Mendez sits down.

He's up to eight.

But he's gone.

mendez_ko_win.title: Victory by KO
mendez_ko_win.narrator: Doors open faster when you make noise.
mendez_ko_win.text:
The referee stops.

Victory.

A promoter in a suit is already waiting for you.

**"Bigger. More risky. Better paid. *

mendez_decision.title: Win at Points
mendez_decision.text:
Unanimous decision.

Victory.

Malik's nodding.

*"You boxed with your head. *

mendez_loss.title: First Defeat
mendez_loss.narrator: Losing a fight is not losing a career.
mendez_loss.text:
You end up.

But the decision is clear.

Defeat.

In the locker room, Malik doesn't scream.

**"Now you know what it is. We're rebuilding. *

contrat_promoteur.title: The Fast Deal
contrat_promoteur.narrator: Brilliant contracts often hide the hardest blows.
contrat_promoteur.text:
The promoter's name is Sorel.

**"Fight in three weeks. Undefeated opponent. Local TV. *

Malik doesn't like it.

**"Too early. *

Sorel smiles.

**"The champions are not waiting to be ready. *

contrat_malik.title: The Patient Road
contrat_malik.narrator: Some paths go up slowly, but less bones break.
contrat_malik.text:
You refuse to rush.

Malik smiles.

**"Regional tournament. Three fights. You win, you get into the top. You lose, you learn. *

circuit_secondaire.title: The Small Circuits
circuit_secondaire.text:
You're going down.

Small rooms.

Used gloves.

You win a fight.

Then another.

Malik says:

**"An undefeated boxer doesn't know who he is yet. You start. *

doute.title: Night After
doute.text:
You see the hook again.

Again.

Malik ends up calling.

**"Come tomorrow. Even if you don't want to. Especially if you don't want to. *

analyse_drago.title: Analysis — Ivan Drago
analyse_drago.narrator: The quick contract leads to a wall.
analyse_drago.text:
Style:
- huge power
- little volume
- every mistake is expensive

Weaknesses:
- slow start
- bad at angles
- get mad if we refuse the exchange

Malik closes the file.

**"Never stand in front. Never. *

drago_1.title: Drago — The Mass
drago_1.narrator: Only one bad choice can stop it.
drago_1.text:
Drago is moving slowly.

No jab.

Just a heavy line getting ready.

drago_good.title: Angle Found
drago_good.text:
You're out of the line.

His right goes through the air.

You touch the body twice.

choices.text: Refuse the exchange to the end

drago_block.title: Even blocked, it hurts.
drago_block.text:
You're blocking.

Your arm is getting heavy.

You understand that blocking is not a solution.

drago_ko_loss.title: KO Brutal
drago_ko_loss.text:
You're trading.

Error.

Right is coming.

Black.

drago_win.title: Upset
drago_win.narrator: A victory too fast creates a legend too soon.
drago_win.text:
You make him miss.

Round after round.

Surprised decision.

Malik isn't smiling.

**"Now they will want to burn you faster. *

drago_survive_loss.title: Courageous Defeat
drago_survive_loss.narrator: You lose, but you stay up.
drago_survive_loss.text:
Drago wins points.

The audience still applauds.

Your name is circulating.

apres_drago.title: After Black
apres_drago.narrator: The body forgets less quickly than the ego.
apres_drago.text:
You wake up.

Malik is by the bed.

**"Awful contract. But not end of career. Unless you decide. *

tournoi_regional.title: Regional tournament
tournoi_regional.narrator: The real career begins when the fighting goes on.
tournoi_regional.text:
Next opponent: **Elias Reed**.

Style:
- Counterfeit
- wait for the mistakes
- very good direct straight
- weak when forced to lead

Malik summarizes:

**"Don't throw yourself away. Move it forward. *

reed_1.title: Reed — The Counterer
reed_1.narrator: He's waiting for you to make the mistake.
reed_1.text:
Reed doesn't move much.

High guard.

He wants you in.

reed_good.title: You The Force to React
reed_good.text:
You're pretending.

Reed bit slightly.

His direct leaves in a vacuum.

Open flank.

reed_neutral.title: Patience
reed_neutral.narrator: The public is bored. Good sign.
reed_neutral.text:
You're spinning.

Reed's waiting.

Malik shouts:

**"Make it start! *

reed_bad.title: Against Full Axis
reed_bad.text:
You're moving too straight.

Reed picks you up with his direct.

Net.

reed_bad2.title: Gourmet
reed_bad2.text:
You're charging.

Reed's waiting for you.

Direct.

Crochet.

You're standing.

reed_2.title: Reed Forward Finally
reed_2.text:
Reed's moving.

He doesn't like it.

His front foot is dragging.

coin_reed.title: The Corner — Lucidity
coin_reed.text:
Malik shakes you.

**"Want to impress or win? Move it forward, sting, get out. Nothing else. *

reed_win.title: Regional victory
reed_win.text:
Unanimous decision.

You win.

The ranking is open.

Next step: **Lena Ward**, interclub champion.

reed_close.title: Locked Decision
reed_close.text:
Shared decision.

You don't win much.

Malik says:

**"A career is also a bad win. *

analyse_ward.title: Analysis — Lena Ward
analyse_ward.narrator: At this level, weaknesses look like traps.
analyse_ward.text:
Style:
- change of pace
- constant feints
- excellent side exit
- punishes foreseeable counters

Weaknesses:
- lower the guard after three jabs
- doesn't like body attacks at the end of the round
- becomes impatient if the public whistles

Malik's looking at you.

**"The file is no longer sufficient. You must feel the moment. *

choices.text: Do some side fights before Ward

ward_1.title: Ward — First Rhythm
ward_1.text:
Ward's turning.

Jab.

Break.

Jab.

Longer break.

Third jab?

ward_good.title: Third Jab
ward_good.text:
The third jab leaves.

His guard is coming down.

A fraction.

ward_neutral.title: You survive the Rhythm
ward_neutral.text:
You're back.

Ward smiles.

It imposes tempo.

ward_bad.title: Punishment
ward_bad.narrator: She was waiting for your impatience.
ward_bad.text:
You're leaving too soon.

Ward's slipping.

His against touch clear.

ward_2.title: End of Round
ward_2.text:
Ward is accelerating.

High guard.

Open body.

choices.text: Search for KO in the lead

ward_good2.title: She Folds
ward_good2.text:
First shot to the body.

Second.

Ward, step back.

The bell rings.

ward_neutral2.title: Round Locked
ward_neutral2.text:
You're protecting.

Ward scores a little.

Malik tightens the jaw.

ward_bad2.title: Too high
ward_bad2.text:
You're looking for your head.

Ward disappears.

His hook cuts your legs.

coin_ward.title: Last Council
coin_ward.narrator: The last recovery picks the career.
coin_ward.text:
Malik's talking fast.

**"If you have your legs, cut off his exit. Otherwise, hang up and steal seconds. The champion is the one who makes the right tired decision. *

ward_final.title: Last Round — Ward
ward_final.text:
Ward fake.

Jab.

Jab.

She's waiting for you.

His back foot slides.

She's preparing the side exit.

choices.text: Cut the exit and hit the body

ward_win.title: Victory — Title Interclubs
ward_win.narrator: You just became someone in this sport.
ward_win.text:
You cut his way out.

Body.

Still body.

Decision.

Victory.

You're entering the top of the ranking.

ward_top3.title: Locked Decision
ward_top3.narrator: You didn't dominate. You survived intelligently.
ward_top3.text:
You hang up.

You steal seconds.

Shared decision.

Victory.

You finish top three.

ward_loss.title: Defeats Ward
ward_loss.text:
You're on your way.

Ward read it.

You end up.

But the decision is clear.

Fourth this season.

Not an end.

A place to go.

fin_champion.title: End — Champion Promitter
fin_champion.narrator: The summit is never the end.
fin_champion.text:
You're finishing the interclub champion season.

Contracts are coming.

You're not the best in the world yet.

But nobody laughs when you say you want to be.

Malik hangs the belt on the wall.

**"Now the real work begins. *

fin_top3.title: End — Top 3
fin_top3.text:
You end up in top three.

Not undefeated.

Not untouchable.

But respected.

Malik says:

**" Spectacular, it burns fast. Smart, hard. *

choices.text: Trying a return for the title

fin_quatrieme.title: End — Fourth
fin_quatrieme.narrator: A career is also judged in the place that we refuse to give up.
fin_quatrieme.text:
You finish fourth.

No title.

But in the rooms, boxers know your name.

You lost.

You learned.

The next season, nobody wants to fall against you in the first round.

fin_abandon.title: End — Gloves Au Placard
fin_abandon.narrator: Sometimes survival means leaving the ring.
fin_abandon.text:
You're not going back to the room.

One day you find your old gloves.

They still smell leather and fear.

You didn't become a champion.

But riding in a ring once already required courage.

hub_combats_annexes.title: The Secondary Circuit
hub_combats_annexes.text:
Sorel offers you several contracts.

Small rooms.
Local television.
Dangerous fights.
Strange styles.

Malik sighs.

**"Some fights will make you progress. Others will just ruin you. Choose well. *

On the table, eight files are opened.

choices.text: Facing Luis Ortega — the mobile left-hander
Facing Pavel Kruger — the slow bumper
Confronting Jin Mori — the defensive technician
Facing Hassan Vale — the dirty fighter

hub_combats_annexes_2.title: Other Files
hub_combats_annexes_2.narrator: The more you look at the names, the more the career looks like a maze.
hub_combats_annexes_2.text:
Malik is pushing four other files to you.

**"These are not necessarily stronger. But they're different. And different, in a ring, it often means dangerous. *

choices.text: Facing Alexei Petrov — the former Olympic
Confront Miguel Santos — the explosive puncher
Facing Derek Hayes — the Patient Counterfeit
Facing Elio Nova — the Fast Showman

ortega_intro.title: Analysis — Luis Ortega
ortega_intro.narrator: Every boxer has a fatal habit.
ortega_intro.text:
File: **Luis Ortega**

Style:
- left-hand mobile

Analysis:
- He's always on the right after his jab. His liver remains open when he rotates.

Malik summarizes:

**"You don't need to be perfect. You just need to recognize the moment. *

ortega_fight.title: Luis Ortega — Key Exchange
ortega_fight.text:
Ortega jabbe, turn right. His left elbow goes up.

The opening is short.

Very short.

choices.text: Follow its pivot with the low guard

ortega_win.title: Victory against Luis Ortega
ortega_win.narrator: Every win changes your career slightly.
ortega_win.text:
You read Luis Ortega perfectly.

The public reacts immediately.

Malik seems almost proud.

**"There, you're really starting to understand the ring. *

ortega_neutral.title: Fight Squad
ortega_neutral.narrator: Sometimes surviving is already a victory.
ortega_neutral.text:
The fight remains tight.

You got it.

Luis Ortega too.

The decision could go any way.

choices.text: Stop the risks and prepare Ward

ortega_loss.title: Defeat against Luis Ortega
ortega_loss.narrator: Defeats sometimes build more than victories.
ortega_loss.text:
Luis Ortega wins.

You're kicking.

A lot.

But Malik looks at you with curiosity.

**"Now we'll see what you're doing after suffering. *

kruger_intro.title: Analysis — Pavel Kruger
kruger_intro.narrator: Every boxer has a fatal habit.
kruger_intro.text:
File: **Pavel Kruger**

Style:
- Slow striker

Analysis:
- His swings are dangerous but long. If he misses twice, he breathes heavy.

Malik summarizes:

**"You don't need to be perfect. You just need to recognize the moment. *

kruger_fight.title: Pavel Kruger — Key Exchange
kruger_fight.text:
Kruger's arming an immense right. All his weight goes ahead.

The opening is short.

Very short.

kruger_win.title: Victory over Pavel Kruger
kruger_win.narrator: Every win changes your career slightly.
kruger_win.text:
You read Pavel Kruger perfectly.

The public reacts immediately.

Malik seems almost proud.

**"There, you're really starting to understand the ring. *

kruger_neutral.title: Fight Squad
kruger_neutral.narrator: Sometimes surviving is already a victory.
kruger_neutral.text:
The fight remains tight.

You got it.

Pavel Kruger, too.

The decision could go any way.

choices.text: Stop the risks and prepare Ward

kruger_loss.title: Defeat against Pavel Kruger
kruger_loss.narrator: Defeats sometimes build more than victories.
kruger_loss.text:
Pavel Kruger wins.

You're kicking.

A lot.

But Malik looks at you with curiosity.

**"Now we'll see what you're doing after suffering. *

mori_intro.title: Analysis — Jin Mori
mori_intro.narrator: Every boxer has a fatal habit.
mori_intro.text:
File: **Jin Mori**

Style:
- defensive technician

Analysis:
- He's waiting for clean attacks. He hates dirty and short sequences.

Malik summarizes:

**"You don't need to be perfect. You just need to recognize the moment. *

mori_fight.title: Jin Mori — Key Exchange
mori_fight.text:
Mori stays still. He's waiting for your jab as if he already knew the rest.

The opening is short.

Very short.

choices.text: Feint and then hit the body

mori_win.title: Win over Jin Mori
mori_win.narrator: Every win changes your career slightly.
mori_win.text:
You read Jin Mori perfectly.

The public reacts immediately.

Malik seems almost proud.

**"There, you're really starting to understand the ring. *

mori_neutral.title: Fight Squad
mori_neutral.narrator: Sometimes surviving is already a victory.
mori_neutral.text:
The fight remains tight.

You got it.

Jin Mori, too.

The decision could go any way.

choices.text: Stop the risks and prepare Ward

mori_loss.title: Defeat against Jin Mori
mori_loss.narrator: Defeats sometimes build more than victories.
mori_loss.text:
Jin Mori wins.

You're kicking.

A lot.

But Malik looks at you with curiosity.

**"Now we'll see what you're doing after suffering. *

vale_intro.title: Analysis — Hassan Vale
vale_intro.narrator: Every boxer has a fatal habit.
vale_intro.text:
File: **Hassan Vale**

Style:
- dirty fighter

Analysis:
- He hangs, pushes from the shoulder, knocks at the limit. After his clinches, his guard opens.

Malik summarizes:

**"You don't need to be perfect. You just need to recognize the moment. *

vale_fight.title: Hassan Vale — Key Exchange
vale_fight.text:
Vale, hang on. His shoulder pushes your chin. The referee sees almost nothing.

The opening is short.

Very short.

choices.text: Small uppercut short out of clinch
Reply dirty and lose your calm

vale_win.title: Victory against Hassan Vale
vale_win.narrator: Every win changes your career slightly.
vale_win.text:
You read Hassan Vale perfectly.

The public reacts immediately.

Malik seems almost proud.

**"There, you're really starting to understand the ring. *

vale_neutral.title: Fight Squad
vale_neutral.narrator: Sometimes surviving is already a victory.
vale_neutral.text:
The fight remains tight.

You got it.

Hassan Vale, too.

The decision could go any way.

choices.text: Stop the risks and prepare Ward

vale_loss.title: Defeat against Hassan Vale
vale_loss.narrator: Defeats sometimes build more than victories.
vale_loss.text:
Hassan Vale wins.

You're kicking.

A lot.

But Malik looks at you with curiosity.

**"Now we'll see what you're doing after suffering. *

petrov_intro.title: Analysis — Alexei Petrov
petrov_intro.narrator: Every boxer has a fatal habit.
petrov_intro.text:
File: **Alexei Petrov**

Style:
- former Olympic

Analysis:
- Very clean, very predictable. Three jabs, left exit, center recovery.

Malik summarizes:

**"You don't need to be perfect. You just need to recognize the moment. *

petrov_fight.title: Alexei Petrov — Key Exchange
petrov_fight.text:
Petrov launches his third jab. His left foot is already looking for the exit.

The opening is short.

Very short.

choices.text: Cut out with a short hook
Waiting for him to finish his show

petrov_win.title: Victory against Alexei Petrov
petrov_win.narrator: Every win changes your career slightly.
petrov_win.text:
You read Alexei Petrov perfectly.

The public reacts immediately.

Malik seems almost proud.

**"There, you're really starting to understand the ring. *

petrov_neutral.title: Fight Squad
petrov_neutral.narrator: Sometimes surviving is already a victory.
petrov_neutral.text:
The fight remains tight.

You got it.

Alexei Petrov, too.

The decision could go any way.

choices.text: Stop the risks and prepare Ward

petrov_loss.title: Defeat against Alexei Petrov
petrov_loss.narrator: Defeats sometimes build more than victories.
petrov_loss.text:
Alexei Petrov wins.

You're kicking.

A lot.

But Malik looks at you with curiosity.

**"Now we'll see what you're doing after suffering. *

santos_intro.title: Analysis — Miguel Santos
santos_intro.narrator: Every boxer has a fatal habit.
santos_intro.text:
File: **Miguel Santos**

Style:
- explosive punch

Analysis:
- Terrible first minute. But his mind breaks if he doesn't put you down fast.

Malik summarizes:

**"You don't need to be perfect. You just need to recognize the moment. *

santos_fight.title: Miguel Santos — Key Exchange
santos_fight.text:
Santos explodes from the bell. Three shots arrive without breathing.

The opening is short.

Very short.

choices.text: Search the show in the center

santos_win.title: Victory against Miguel Santos
santos_win.narrator: Every win changes your career slightly.
santos_win.text:
You read Miguel Santos perfectly.

The public reacts immediately.

Malik seems almost proud.

**"There, you're really starting to understand the ring. *

santos_neutral.title: Fight Squad
santos_neutral.narrator: Sometimes surviving is already a victory.
santos_neutral.text:
The fight remains tight.

You got it.

Miguel Santos too.

The decision could go any way.

choices.text: Stop the risks and prepare Ward

santos_loss.title: Defeat against Miguel Santos
santos_loss.narrator: Defeats sometimes build more than victories.
santos_loss.text:
Miguel Santos wins.

You're kicking.

A lot.

But Malik looks at you with curiosity.

**"Now we'll see what you're doing after suffering. *

hayes_intro.title: Analysis — Derek Hayes
hayes_intro.narrator: Every boxer has a fatal habit.
hayes_intro.text:
File: **Derek Hayes**

Style:
- counter patient

Analysis:
- It never starts. If you give him the center, he gets uncomfortable.

Malik summarizes:

**"You don't need to be perfect. You just need to recognize the moment. *

hayes_fight.title: Derek Hayes — Key Exchange
hayes_fight.text:
Hayes is waiting. His gloves don't move. He wants your first move.

The opening is short.

Very short.

choices.text: Leave him the center and feel

hayes_win.title: Victory against Derek Hayes
hayes_win.narrator: Every win changes your career slightly.
hayes_win.text:
You read Derek Hayes perfectly.

The public reacts immediately.

Malik seems almost proud.

**"There, you're really starting to understand the ring. *

hayes_neutral.title: Fight Squad
hayes_neutral.narrator: Sometimes surviving is already a victory.
hayes_neutral.text:
The fight remains tight.

You got it.

Derek Hayes, too.

The decision could go any way.

choices.text: Stop the risks and prepare Ward

hayes_loss.title: Defeat against Derek Hayes
hayes_loss.narrator: Defeats sometimes build more than victories.
hayes_loss.text:
Derek Hayes wins.

You're kicking.

A lot.

But Malik looks at you with curiosity.

**"Now we'll see what you're doing after suffering. *

nova_intro.title: Analysis — Elio Nova
nova_intro.narrator: Every boxer has a fatal habit.
nova_intro.text:
File: **Elio Nova**

Style:
- Quick showman

Analysis:
- He's playing with the audience. When he smiles at the cameras, his chin stays high.

Malik summarizes:

**"You don't need to be perfect. You just need to recognize the moment. *

nova_fight.title: Elio Nova — Key Exchange
nova_fight.text:
Nova smiles in the front row. His arm drops a fraction of a second.

The opening is short.

Very short.

choices.text: Direct dry before it is replaced
To provoke him in your turn

nova_win.title: Victory over Elio Nova
nova_win.narrator: Every win changes your career slightly.
nova_win.text:
You read Elio Nova perfectly.

The public reacts immediately.

Malik seems almost proud.

**"There, you're really starting to understand the ring. *

nova_neutral.title: Fight Squad
nova_neutral.narrator: Sometimes surviving is already a victory.
nova_neutral.text:
The fight remains tight.

You got it.

Elio Nova, too.

The decision could go any way.

choices.text: Stop the risks and prepare Ward

nova_loss.title: Defeat against Elio Nova
nova_loss.narrator: Defeats sometimes build more than victories.
nova_loss.text:
Elio Nova wins.

You're kicking.

A lot.

But Malik looks at you with curiosity.

**"Now we'll see what you're doing after suffering. *

fin_entraineur.title: End — Coach
fin_entraineur.narrator: A career is sometimes passed on better than it gets.
fin_entraineur.text:
You've never become the greatest.

But years later, in a small room that still smells of leather and sweat, a young boxer asks you:

*"Coach... How do we read a feint? *

You're smiling.

And for a moment, you see Malik again.

fin_consultant.title: End — TV consultant
fin_consultant.narrator: Understanding the ring is sometimes another form of victory.
fin_consultant.text:
You're developing a reputation as a technician.

Sports channels are starting to invite you.

You analyze fighting better than many former champions.

The audience learns to listen to your eyes.

fin_boxeur_peuple.title: End — People's Boxer
fin_boxeur_peuple.narrator: Some legends never wear a belt.
fin_boxeur_peuple.text:
You've never been a champion.

But people come for you.

Because they know you might fall.

But never without getting up.

fin_retour.title: End — The Return
fin_retour.narrator: We're really done only when we agree to be done.
fin_retour.text:
We thought you were done.

Too many defeats.
Too many wounds.

Then one night, you come back.

And everyone gets up.

fin_abandon_definitif.title: End — Gloves Au Placard
fin_abandon_definitif.narrator: Sometimes survival means leaving the ring.
fin_abandon_definitif.text:
You're not going back to the room.

One day you find your old gloves.

They still smell leather and fear.

You didn't become a champion.

But riding in a ring once already required courage.
